Solicitation for R6 — Attakar × Gura (Attakar)

Health-survey firm sought to run the bi-monthly household verification survey across the R6 Attakar (intervention) and Gura (comparison) wards. Enumerators administer the primary research form plus the independent back-check used to verify program-reported coverage.
